title: thalictrum sylvaticum subsp. frutetorum
intro: Thalictrum sylvaticum subsp. frutetorum, also known as the woodland meadow rue, is a perennial plant that belongs to the family Ranunculaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Thalictrum sylvaticum subsp. frutetorum include relief from digestive issues, pain management, and reduction of inflammation, making it a valuable herb for treating various ailments. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
